test_cases.description: Sports documentary applying to arts council international fund

input.title: The Distance Runners
input.subject: Three East African runners in European marathon circuits — economic infrastructure of elite African athletics
input.funder: National arts council, international co-production fund
input.track_record: Director's previous doc at Hot Docs and CPH:DOX

test_cases.notes: Significance section addresses funder priorities explicitly. Creative approach section describes actual filmmaking choices, not intentions. Impact section names concrete targets.

test_cases.description: Short film applying to national film institute development fund

input.title: Night Soil
input.subject: Elderly night-soil collectors still working in a West African city using pre-industrial methods — their routes unchanged for 60 years
input.funder: National film institute, new voices development fund
input.what_funded: Director attachment fee and development travel

test_cases.notes: New voices fund framing appropriate. Short film format handled well. Impact section appropriately scaled for a short — festival circuit rather than broadcaster.

test_cases.description: Investigative journalism series applying to foundation fund

input.title: The Procurement Files
input.subject: Three-year investigation into how public infrastructure contracts are awarded in three EU countries — documented through leaked procurement records
input.stage: Production — investigation complete, filming begins in 3 months

test_cases.notes: Foundation register correctly differentiated from arts council language. Significance section addresses public interest journalism mandate. Evidence-based framing appropriate for journalism fund.
